name: nuxt-blueprints
description: Building blocks for assembling Nuxt applications

core.description: Database, theming, Nuxt UI, layouts, users table, migration infrastructure

email/smtp.description: SMTP email transport with MailHog for development

auth-jwt.description: JWT authentication with email verification, password reset, login/register/profile pages

auth-google.description: Google OAuth sign-in via Google Identity Services

activity-log.description: Audit trail for user actions with database-backed event logging

rate-limiting/db.description: Database-backed rate limiting, queries activity_logs table

rate-limiting/memory.description: In-memory rate limiting, no DB dependency, resets on server restart

s3-storage.description: S3-compatible file storage with presigned URLs

kitchen-sink.description: UI component showcase page for development reference

rate-limiting.label: Rate Limiting Strategy
rate-limiting.description: How API endpoints are rate limited
